behaviors.behavior: Store: dismiss persists a slug per projectId (schemaVersion-1 JSON)
Store: dismissals keyed by projectId, no cross-project leakage
Store: dismiss is idempotent; restore removes + no-op when absent
Store: round-trips across instances; tolerant of missing/corrupt file
Store: write wrapped in lock (acquire->write->release), released even on write failure
Route: POST dismiss -> 200, persisted, GET annotates dismissed:true
Route: POST restore -> 200, GET annotates dismissed:false; default is false
Route: dismiss a derivedFromEvents ghost with NO campaign dir
Route: 404 unknown + synthesized project; 400 control-char slug; 503 ELOCKED
Selector: selectDismissedCampaigns = dismissed subset; draft/done excluded; absent=not-dismissed
API: dismiss/restoreCampaign POST correct endpoints, encode segments, throw on non-2xx
Hook: useDismissCampaign dismiss/restore branch; invalidates campaignsKey only on success
Button: Erledigt/Wiederherstellen label + click->mutate; hidden w/o project; disabled when pending
Lane: visible/dismissed split + show-dismissed toggle reveal; lane hidden when empty
End-to-end (real browser): dismiss ghost -> leaves lane -> show-dismissed -> restore -> returns

surface_verification.justification: touches_public_api: new POST /api/campaigns/:projectId/:slug/{dismiss,restore} endpoints + an additive `dismissed` annotation on GET /api/campaigns, all consumed by the Campaigns board UI -> web surface mandatory. Executed client/e2e/flows/campaign-dismiss.spec.ts against an isolated single-process stack (temp USERPROFILE, SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR=client/dist, PORT=4188, loopback) with a real Chromium: dismiss a derivedFromEvents ghost -> leaves the active lane -> show-dismissed toggle -> restore -> returns. 1 passed (3.9s).
